description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that triggers on push with tags. For the ant-design-blazor repository, set up .NET Core 3.1.300, .NET 5.0.100, and .NET 6.0, install Node.js 10.x, and prepare AOT workload. Package and publish to NuGet, upload package artifact, publish documentation, deploy to GitHub Pages and GitHub.io, and sync to Gitee.
